name: astro-images
principles: All image processing happens locally at build time, never at runtime or on a CDN.
Pattern = rendered width; aspect ratio is independent.
Three formats AVIF -> WebP -> (JPG opaque | PNG transparent), each with its OWN quality.
One download per layout slot; never two + CSS hide.

quality.note: AVIF and WebP scales are non-comparable. AVIF must be lower so its output is SMALLER than WebP at the same width. AVIF q50 ~ WebP q60 perceptually, ~25-40% smaller.

rules.use-picture-with-pattern: error: content images use <Picture> with a pattern (ArtPicture for art direction).
rules.per-format-quality: error: AVIF must use a lower quality than WebP; never one shared quality for all formats.
rules.avif-lighter-than-webp: error: AVIF output must be SMALLER than WebP at the same width; if not, lower AVIF quality and regen --force.
rules.alpha-aware-fallback: error: fallback is JPG for opaque sources, PNG only for transparent; never PNG fallback for opaque photos.
rules.single-download-per-slot: error: never two + CSS hide; use ArtPicture for per-breakpoint art direction.
rules.art-direction-single-download: error: different image/crop per breakpoint uses ArtPicture <source media>, one download only.
rules.no-artpicture-for-resize: error: same image different size uses <Picture>, not ArtPicture.
rules.dimensions-required: error: every image needs width/height (explicit or from asset import).
rules.assets-location: error: images in /src/assets/, or /public/ only when processed by optimize-images.mjs.
rules.single-lcp: error: only one lcp per page.
rules.no-fixed-width-preload: error: never preload a fixed-width image file; rely on fetchpriority (lcp). Responsive imagesrcset preload only if hero is discovered late.
rules.sizes-required: error: sizes must match layout; lazy images may use sizes=auto.
rules.face-focus: error: object-position center 20% for people; ASK if ambiguous.
rules.checkerboard-image-first: error: checkerboard image first in DOM, reordered via CSS order.
rules.og-format-jpg: error: OG images must be JPG, must exist, and require og:image:type meta; never WebP/AVIF or non-generated width.
rules.seo-filename: error: source filename = kebab-case keyword-locality slug; forbid IMG_*, spaces, accents, generic hero.jpg.
rules.alt-seo-quality: error: alt is accurate + natural keyword, no stuffing, no 'image of', decorative empty; ASK if content/keyword/locality unknown.
rules.no-single-size-content: error: content images must have a responsive srcset.
rules.no-raw-raster-img: error: raw only for FixedImage output, SVG, or external URLs; no raster content .
rules.delivered-dimensions: error: width/height are delivered dimensions, not source.
rules.hero-not-lazy: error: hero never lazy; below-fold never eager.
rules.robots-allow-astro: error: robots.txt must not block /_astro/ or the image dir.
rules.no-png-opaque: error: no PNG output for opaque photos.
rules.no-upscaling: error: never upscale beyond source width.

incremental.default: incremental (mtime); never wipe output at startup

validation: grep -n "_astro" public/robots.txt 2>/dev/null && echo 'WARNING: ensure robots does not Disallow /_astro/'
# (manual spot-check, not auto-runnable) ls -l dist/_astro/<hero>*1600*.avif dist/_astro/<hero>*1600*.webp   # AVIF must be smaller
